text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Apr 26 18:13:49 2014
New Revision: 352328
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352328
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352328/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/188414
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-MessageStack/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-MessageStack/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-MessageStack/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:44 2014	(r352327)
+++ head/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-MessageStack/Makefile	Sat Apr 26 18:13:49 2014	(r352328)
@@ -7,8 +7,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A message stack for your CGI::Application
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Message stack for your CGI::Application
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-CGI-Application>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application \
 		p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Session>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-CGI-Application-Plugin-Session \
